title: The Sap
writer: William Grew, Edward T. Lowe Jr., Philip Klein
actors: Kenneth Harlan, Heinie Conklin, Mary McAllister
plot: Barry Weston is raised by his widowed mother and is, at best, a "mama's boy," and, at worst, a bit of a coward. He is drafted into the A.E.F. when World War I breaks out, and accidentally captures a nest of German snipers, and is ...
